ch3_hub.text: The central hub is eerily quiet. Emergency power casts long, flickering shadows. The station is on lockdown. You need to figure out why the structural alarms failed before the breach. You can check the Security Hub or try to access Miller's personal quarters.

choices.text: Rest and process what happened. (End Chapter)

ch3_security.text: You enter the Security Hub. David is glaring at a bank of monitors, sweating profusely. 'What do you want? I'm busy rerouting power to life support.'
ch3_security.speaker: David

choices.text: 'Why didn't the alarms sound before the cavern breached?'
Sneak a peek at his terminal.

ch3_security_ask.text: 'Sensors in the lower decks have been blind for two days,' David snaps. 'I logged it. Miller was supposed to fix them.' He glares at you. 'Now leave me alone.'
ch3_security_ask.speaker: David

choices.text: Leave him alone and return to the hub.

ch3_security_push.text: David slams his fist on the console. 'I said leave it! I wiped the logs, okay? There was some off-the-books salvage I didn't want Corporate seeing. But I didn't cause the breach!'
ch3_security_push.speaker: David

choices.text: Record his confession. (Gain Clue: Wiped Logs)

ch3_security_terminal.text: While David is distracted by a comms ping, you glance at the main terminal log. You spot a 'Server Wipe Audit'. David manually scrubbed the camera feeds 48 hours ago.

choices.text: Download the log to your PDA (Gain Clue: Server Wipe Audit).

ch3_miller_quarters.text: Miller's door is unlocked. His room is sparse, but his desk is covered in mechanical schematics and overdue medical bills for his daughter on Earth. There is also a small, secure locker.

ch3_miller_bills.text: The bills are astronomical. Attached is a denial of loan from Corporate. Beneath them is an email draft from Miller to an unknown buyer, offering to sell 'unregistered biological samples' for a huge sum.

choices.text: Take the email draft. (Gain Clue: Miller's Debt)

ch3_miller_locker.text: The locker is sealed with a biometric lock. You can't open it without Miller's fingerprint. Or... maybe you can bypass it?

choices.text: Attempt to hotwire the lock. (Risk of shock)

ch3_miller_shock.text: You pry open the panel and cross the wires. Sparks fly, burning your hand, but the locker clicks open. Inside is a large, sealed canister pulsing with green light. The Abyssal Toxin.

ch3_end.text: You retreat to your quarters. Miller wasn't a hero. He disabled the sensors to smuggle the glowing mud out, blinding the station to the creature that breached the hull. And David wiped the cameras to hide his own theft. The crew is compromised.

choices.text: Sleep and prepare for the next cycle.
